description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 4th; Slot belt; Price 11,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This belt grants its wearer a +2 enhancement bonus to Strength, and the ability to ignore difficult terrain while charging or making an overrun, bull rush, or trample attempt. Treat the enhancement bonus to Strength as a temporary ability bonus for the first 24 hours the belt is worn. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, bullâs strength, feather step; Cost 5,500 gp.
